agent_response_text:
I understand you're looking for fast chargers. I found several options that could be a good fit.

The **Apple - 29W USB-C Power Adapter - White** is a strong option, offering fast and efficient charging, particularly for MacBook computers with a USB-C port.

products_hits.name: Apple - 29W USB-C Power Adapter - White
products_hits.description: The Apple 29W USB-C Power adapter offers fast, efficient charging at home, in the office, or on the go. This adapter is compatible with MacBook computers featuring a USB-C port and requires a USB-C Charge Cable (sold separately).

hierarchicalCategories.lvl2: Computers & Tablets > Laptop Accessories > Laptop Chargers & Adapters

products_hits.name: Platinum - Quick Charge Wall Charger - Black
products_hits.description: Platinum Quick Charge Wall Charger: Keep your electronic devices powered with this universally compatible charger. Qualcomm Quick Charge 2.0 enables fast charging for a wide range of devices, including smartphones, tablets, e-readers and more.

products_hits.name: DigiPower - Travel Charger - Black
products_hits.description: Power up your Sony digital camera battery with this DigiPower RF-TC-55S travel charger that offers a 1-amp USB charging port and a fast refueling time. The charger includes a European wall plug, so you can power your device while you're on vacation.

hierarchicalCategories.lvl2: Cameras & Camcorders > Digital Camera Accessories > Camera Batteries & Power
hierarchicalCategories.lvl3: Cameras & Camcorders > Digital Camera Accessories > Camera Batteries & Power > Camera Chargers & Adapters

products_hits.name: Apple - 12W USB Power Adapter - White
products_hits.description: Keep your iPad, iPad mini, iPhone or iPod powered and ready for use with this 12W Apple® MD836LL/A USB adapter that features a Lightning connector for fast, efficient charging. The compact design enables simple on-the-go portability.

hierarchicalCategories.lvl2: Computers & Tablets > iPad & Tablet Accessories > iPad Accessories
hierarchicalCategories.lvl3: Computers & Tablets > iPad & Tablet Accessories > iPad Accessories > iPad A/V Cables & Adapters

products_hits.name: DigiPower - Dual USB Vehicle Charger - Black
products_hits.description: Recharge your mobile phone, MP3 player or tablet while you're on the go with this DigiPower SP-PC200 vehicle charger, which delivers 10.5W of power for fast performance and features dual USB interfaces for simultaneously providing power to 2 devices.

hierarchicalCategories.lvl2: Cell Phones > Cell Phone Accessories > Car Chargers
